Class CatalogApi

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.api.CatalogApi
public final class CatalogApi extends Object
Wrappers for catalog and specials endpoints. Uses ApiClient with JWT when set. Many GET routes stay public so some calls work before login.

    • fetchProductSpecials

      public static List<CatalogApi.ProductSpecialResponse> fetchProductSpecials() throws Exception
      Loads all product specials from GET /api/v1/product-specials/all. Each row includes product fields plus featured date and discount. Some ids stay in JSON only.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • createProductSpecial

      public static CatalogApi.ProductSpecialResponse createProductSpecial(int productId, String featuredOn, double discountPercent) throws Exception
      POST /api/v1/product-specials. Response includes the server-assigned special id.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • updateProductSpecial

      public static CatalogApi.ProductSpecialResponse updateProductSpecial(int productSpecialId, int productId, String featuredOn, double discountPercent) throws Exception
      PUT /api/v1/product-specials with id in the path replaces the whole special row.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • fetchBakeryHours

      public static List<CatalogApi.BakeryHourJson> fetchBakeryHours(int bakeryId) throws Exception
      GET operating hours for one bakery id. Empty list means no rows returned yet.
      Throws:
      Exception
